brief: A 5-second viral-style video. Set in a dusty construction site with structural steel beams. Mochi (grey tabby) is holding a large nail against a beam. Ronnie (ginger tabby) raises a heavy hammer but accidentally hammers Mochi's paws instead of the nail. The two kittens immediately start an intense cat-play-fight. Funny, chaotic, and high-fidelity.
storyboard_rules: Shot 1: PREPARATION - Mochi holding nail, Ronnie raising hammer. Focus on the 'scary' hammer height.
Shot 2: THE ACCIDENT - Close-up on the hammer hitting paws. Mochi's shock.
Shot 4: THE FIGHT - Chaotic cat fight using fight_composite.mp4 V2V reference.
